info.title: Calendar
info.description: The Zoom Calendar webhooks allow developers to receive events for [Zoom Calendar](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/zoom-calendar/) features.

requestBody.description:
# calendar.event_delete
The **Event delete** event triggers every time you remove an event in your calendar.

## Prerequisites

Enable **Event subscriptions** for your [Marketplace app](http) with the following configurations:

* A valid **Event notification endpoint URL**.
* The **Event delete** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Calendar** event.



**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `calendar:read:admin`,`calendar:read`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `calendar:read:event`,`calendar:read:event:admin`

**Event type**: `calendar.event_delete`

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user's calendar that has the event.

operator.description: This field indicates who performed the action.

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user's calendar that has the event.

operator.description: This field indicates who performed the action.

requestBody.description:
# calendar.calendarlist_update
The **Calendar list update** event triggers every time you update a calendar in your calendar list.

## Prerequisites

Enable **Event subscriptions** for your [Marketplace app](http) with the following configurations:

* A valid **Event notification endpoint URL**.
* The **Calendar list update** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Calendar** event.



**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `calendar:read:admin`,`calendar:read`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `calendar:read:calendar_list`,`calendar:read:calendar_list:admin`

**Event type**: `calendar.calendarlist_update`

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of a user's calendar where the user can add or remove other calendars for event viewing.

operator.description: This field indicates who performed the action.

object.description: The information of the calendar list.

subscribed_calendar_id.description: The calendar ID that the user subscribes to.

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of a user's calendar where the user can add or remove other calendars for event viewing.

operator.description: This field indicates who performed the action.

object.description: The information of the calendar list.

subscribed_calendar_id.description: The calendar ID that the user subscribes to.

# calendar.calendarlist_create
The **Calendar list create** event triggers every time you add a calendar to your calendarlist.

## Prerequisites

Enable **Event subscriptions** for your [Marketplace app](http) with the following configurations:

* A valid **Event notification endpoint URL**.
* The **Calendar list create** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Calendar** event.



**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `calendar:read:admin`,`calendar:read`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `calendar:read:calendar_list`,`calendar:read:calendar_list:admin`

**Event type**: `calendar.calendarlist_create `

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of a user's calendar where the user can add or remove other calendars for event viewing.

operator.description: This field indicates who performed the action.

object.description: The information of the calendar list.

subscribed_calendar_id.description: The calendar ID that the user subscribes to.
